personal.name: Tin
personal.title: Roblox Developer
personal.description: I'm Tin, a Roblox developer with 5+ years of scripting experience. I write scalable, clean, documented, modular code and love solving complex problems in Lua.
bio: I've been part of the Roblox platform for over 5 years, diving deep into its unique ecosystem and community. With more than 5 years of dedicated scripting experience, I specialize in creating scalable, maintainable game systems and responsive UI that enhance player engagement and overall experience.

My passion lies in building robust gameplay mechanics, optimizing multiplayer performance, and designing intuitive user interfaces that keep players coming back. Over the years, I've worked on a variety of projects ranging from competitive multiplayer games to immersive storytelling experiences, always focusing on clean, efficient code and smooth user interactions.

I believe great game development is a blend of creativity and technical excellence, and I strive to deliver both. Whether collaborating with teams or working solo, I prioritize clear communication and adaptability to meet project goals and exceed expectations.
If you're looking for a developer who understands the intricacies of Roblox's engine and can bring your ideas to life with polish and precision, I'm here to help.
personal.skills: Lua scripting • Performance & optimization • Systems design

terms.description: Simple and clear terms to keep projects predictable and fair.
items: No refunds after work has started or deliverables have been handed over.
Payment is negotiated directly and depends on project scope and timeline.
Clear, written requirements are required before work begins.
I reserve the right to decline work that conflicts with my values or expertise.
Delivery timelines are estimated per-project and will be included in the agreement.

reviews.description: Client feedback and screenshots from completed work.

contact.description: Available for freelance and team work. Payment and scope negotiated per-project.
